price_details: Photojournalistic style starting around $3,000. Description leans on connection and emotional pacing rather than posed shot lists, which suggests a documentary approach to how they shoot the day.
notes: Colorado Springs based. The photojournalistic label plus the emphasis on emotional pacing makes it sound like they are chasing real moments over staged ones, which is worth knowing going in if you want more posed portraits than that. $3,000 starting price puts them solidly mid-range for the area.
